summary: A four-year-old girl has died from shigellosis in Kozhikode, with two other children diagnosed. Health authorities urge vigilance and hygiene.

title: Wayanad school food poisoning: Number of students seeking treatment crosses 120
summary: Over 120 students from Mar Baselios AUP School fell ill with suspected bacterial infection, likely from contaminated water. The school is closed for a week pending investigations.
